lessons: Fee formula: 2.25 * 0.25 * (p*(1-p))^2. At p=0.50 fee is 1.406%. At p=0.95 fee is <0.013%. Enter near certainty only.
ALWAYS read fee_rate_bps from MarketState or fresh clob_client.get_market(). NEVER hardcode. Post-Feb-2026 stale rates = silent rejection.
S10 sports markets require min_probability=0.93 (not 0.90). Late-reversal risk in last 5 min causes ~9% miss rate at lower threshold.
S1 NegRisk long arb: buy_all_yes when sum(YES ask prices) < 1.00. Exactly one candidate MUST win. win_probability=1.0 always.
S8 logical violations most common in US politics subset markets (candidate vs party). Scan politics/* first.
S8 classifier cache must be committed to repo (data/s8_direction_cache.json). GitHub Actions runners are ephemeral — in-memory cache lost every run.
max_minutes_remaining in S10 YAML must be > poll_interval_minutes + 15 min buffer. With 30-min GHA poll: use 60. With 60-min poll: use 90.
S4 Chainlink Sniper requires <2 min reaction time. Incompatible with 30-60 min cron polling. Only enable with persistent WebSocket process on VPS.
